debug_info.goal:
nums : List ℤ
h_precond : lengthOfLIS_precond nums
⊢ lengthOfLIS_postcond nums (lengthOfLIS nums h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
unfold lengthOfLIS lengthOfLIS_postcond
  split_ifs with h
  · simp [h, maxInArray, List.isEmpty, List.foldl, List.map, List.reverse, List.filter, List.Pairwise]
  · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold lengthOfLIS lengthOfLIS_postcond
  split
  · simp [maxInArray]
    decide
  · simp [maxInArray]
    sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

induction nums with
  | nil => simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond]
  | cons x xs ih => sorry

induction nums using List.recOn
  · simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond, maxInArray]
  · intro x xs ih
    simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond]
    sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold lengthOfLIS lengthOfLIS_postcond
  split
  · simp [maxInArray]
    decide
  · rename_i h_not_empty
    simp [maxInArray]
    sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold lengthOfLIS lengthOfLIS_postcond
  split
  · simp [lengthOfLIS_precond]
    decide
  · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

induction nums
  · simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond, lengthOfLIS_precond, maxInArray]; decide
  · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold lengthOfLIS lengthOfLIS_postcond
  cases h : nums
  · simp [h, maxInArray]
    rfl
  · simp [h, maxInArray, List.isEmpty]
    sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

induction nums using List.reverseRecOn
  · simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond, maxInArray]
  · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

induction nums
  · simp [lengthOfLIS, lengthOfLIS_postcond, lengthOfLIS_precond]; decide
  · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof
